def solve(nums, k)
    sorted = nums.sort
    n = sorted.length
    max_window = 0
    for i in 0...n do
        target = sorted[i] * k
        low = i
        high = n - 1
        best_j = i - 1
        while low <= high do
            mid = (low + high) / 2
            if sorted[mid] <= target

                low = mid + 1
            else
                high = mid - 1
            end
        end
        current_window = best_j - i + 1
        max_window = [max_window, current_window].max
    end
    return n - max_window
end

def solve(nums, k)
    sorted = nums.sort
    n = sorted.length
    max_window = 0
    for i in 0...n do
        target = sorted[i] * k
        low = i
        high = n - 1
        best_j = i - 1
        while low <= high do
            mid = (low + high) / 2
            if sorted[mid] <= target
                best_j = mid
                low = mid + 1
            else
                high = mid - 1
            end
        end
        current_window = best_j - i + 1
        max_window = [max_window, current_window].max
    end
    return n - max_window
end
